summary: Read-only plan for one actionable open PR candidate. #55861 is the only remaining hydrated open candidate after excluding existing-overlap #55850. actions.reason: Keep #55861 as the canonical candidate within this cluster, but do not recommend merge or fixed-by-candidate closure until behavior proof, checks, mergeability, and review-bot findings are resolved.
